stories: Good morning Sean, it's Friday, April 3, 2026 — and a Happy Good Friday to you
Here's what you need to know before the long weekend begins
Here's your Friday fact: the jellyfish species Turritopsis dohrnii is biologically immortal
When stressed or aging, it can reverse its own cellular development back to an early larval stage — essentially hitting the rewind button on life
Scientists believe it could hold clues to understanding cellular ageing in humans
Not bad for something you can barely see with the naked eye
Your calendar looks clear today — it is Good Friday, after all
From April 1, the government officially extended shared parental leave from 6 weeks to 10 weeks — a meaningful step forward for working families
